assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section

outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 60: '### Product Lifecycle'. Line 62: '- Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle'. Line 63: '- Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT'. Line 64: '- Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200'. Line 65: '- Component label pattern: pscomponent:'. Line 66: '- VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'. All 5 required fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Line 74: '### Version Streams'. Line 78: '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'. Table contains the 2.1.x stream row with the Konflux release repo URL.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Line 80: '### Source Repositories'. Line 84: '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend | upstream |'. Line 85: '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui | upstream |'. Both repositories present with their GitHub URLs.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: Line 20: '## Repository Registry' with table of 2 repos. Line 28: '## Jira Configuration' with 5 fields. Line 35: '## Code Intelligence' with naming convention and example. Line 48: '### Limitations' subsection. Line 53: '## Bug Configuration' with 3 fields. All standard sections present.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 53: '## Bug Configuration'. Line 55: '- Bug issue type ID: 10001'. Line 56: '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md'. Line 57: '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Line 49: '## Step 10 -- Security Configuration'. Line 51: 'User was asked whether to enable security triage and **accepted**.' Lines 53-64 list Product Lifecycle fields collected (Product pages URL, Jira version prefix, Vulnerability issue type ID, Component label pattern, VEX Justification custom field). Lines 66-70 list Version Streams collected. Lines 72-74 list Source Repositories collected.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: Line 5: 'All Project Configuration sections were newly added to CLAUDE.md.' Line 44-45: '### 5. Bug Configuration' with '- **Status**: Newly added'. Line 48-49: '### 6. Security Configuration' with '- **Status**: Newly added'. Other sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence) also marked as 'Newly added' on lines 21, 27, 36 respectively.
